strategies.name: Test NaN handling
strategies.rationale: Check if NaN is handled correctly.
strategies.expected_issue: The optimization incorrectly returns MagSrc when MagSrc is NaN, but DemandedMask does not demand NaN. Wait, if DemandedMask does not demand NaN, returning NaN is fine. Let me re-evaluate.
